textByHashes.cb6052807d74bbf11d8a941f6f34e8882207fe37: Looks like we don't have much choice, boss.
textByHashes.791c1abd7748f50ebb460da45c9521dd6505cc66: I think Surok has an idea for using them, boss!
textByHashes.66cf750ee793729a0b3eb2791520e3cfd8f99617: You wouldn't get me in one of those things! Not on your life!
textByHashes.32b81ebc7f62eb2dd271213a097c70c5cbc6fb03: Can we hurry things up? I've got better things to do than hang around these filthy caves!
textByHashes.ffe5179fedccf5957690c4932043545267e95ce9: I hope that Surok character doesn't come back. There's something not right about him... He makes General Khazard seem normal!
textByHashes.9e77ad4982f64452fb21e84b332784e3f86ebc52: Why you talking to me then? He's right there.
textByHashes.f24da1aa88dd109b6e63b9b984119a2f8a8be15c: Don't think I can help the likes of you! Talk to Movario.
textByHashes.3f882a9ddd4b9530382df1397cbcfc4b1beca7af: It's that big snake over there! I keep telling you, every time you start enticing one, it does something to them! Why don't you listen to me?
textByHashes.a8cf95e7741b9b7af799d16177a83736955506e3: And look who's here as well! The so-called Lord Surok!
textByHashes.724f6c3085dd389ccaf9cdcc1a89e3deb4d0f0cb: No problems! I'll easily deal with you, mate!
textByHashes.a34c74beb1df832fa8b8a16d05694f94ff81e774: This is a wild goose chase! We trek halfway across the world and there's nothing down here but this bunch of useless goblins!
textByHashes.bfb6441954d5434bf67b3762e8459a96390fbcb7: This part of the world is riddled with caves! It's hard not to hit a cave around here! Are you sure you're not just picking up these goblin lanterns or something stupid?
textByHashes.9d4b589a72d77db01d4ffe3caa91485cb61b8e87: Gah! We have an eavesdropper! Buzz off, adventurer - go talk to the goblins or something.
textByHashes.e63e3060894313869e22e3e2561124a718cfe436: Where did you come from? Who sent you? I'll have you know I'm the mage's bodyguard for this job. We don't need anyone else!
textByHashes.9d9378d919ccc87bfbfacb5f586a8dd0445acdae: Well stick your nose somewhere else!
textByHashes.b2ccac8a2c62e8ad51f7007913cc0ea4d993be8e: Don't try to lie to us! Now go away!
textByHashes.ce6c396c7c1684edc72144adc7db62f55800f0a1: To be honest I'm still a bit hazy on that point too.
